title: Fix PlaceBlock schema: add 'count' property (decomposer emits it)
description:
## Problem
`PlaceBlockGoalDecomposer` emits `count` in PlaceBlock action args, but `PlaceBlockTool.InputSchema` didn't declare `count`. Schema validation rejected every place action:
```
[action] place FAIL (0ms): Schema validation failed for 'place': Unexpected property 'count' is not declared in the tool schema.
```

## Fix
Added `"count"` property to `PlaceBlockTool.InputSchema` JSON schema (type: integer, description: "Number of blocks to place (informational, ignored by adapter)").

## Files
- `Agent.Tools/Tools/PlaceBlockTool.cs`

## Validation
- `dotnet build` — 0 warnings
- `dotnet test` — 746/746 passed
